text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I'm ironing out some final concert<n>details with
Light Hello...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Trainer, Hello! The lyrics are done!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
What? No, no, no! That'll be a<n>surprise for the big
day!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
But spoiler warning—the song's going<n>to be
amazing! So start counting down<n>to the day you
get to hear it!

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, that's too bad, Trainer. I guess<n>I'll just
check the lyrics myself then.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Hey, you don't get to listen either!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
This song is our gift to everyone who<n>supported
us, and you don't get to<n>open your presents early.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
But I can't put it on the program if I<n>don't know
what the song's called...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Oh, you and Trainer can think of that!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
It'll be your present to us, after<n>sticking with us all
this time!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I can't wait to see what title you<n>come up with!

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, well this is awkward. Not sure<n>how we're
supposed to name a song<n>we don't know the
lyrics to.
choice_data_list:
I'm sure we can come up with something
together.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I guess so. We do have plenty<n>of time,
fortunately.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
Time to think about what words we<n>want to offer
them.
